contentList.content: Rune Sword Taoist

The Rune Sword Taoist blends sword cultivation and rune cultivation into a Chinese-style immortal path. With Strength and Intelligence as primary abilities and Intelligence as the casting attribute, they wield the sword by rune and nourish the rune by sword. At level 1 they choose between the Sword Path (melee combat) or the Rune Path (spellcasting).
A Chinese-style cultivator blending sword and rune; primary abilities Strength and Intelligence.
Sword Path

The Sword Path masters melee combat, channeling elemental energy into the blade via rune-sword stances, gaining a Sword-Intent Guard AC bonus while unarmored, and increasing attacks per round as they advance in level.
Rune Path
The Rune Path masters spellcraft, with a broader spell pool and a spell-slot capacity approaching the Wizard, and can use the Seal Rune art to crystallize a known spell into a scroll.
Flame Stance
Imbue your blade with flame, dealing an additional 1d6 Fire damage on weapon attacks. Only one stance may be active at a time.
Thunder Stance
Imbue your blade with thunder, dealing an additional 1d6 Thunder damage on weapon attacks. Only one stance may be active at a time.
Frost Stance
Imbue your blade with frost, dealing an additional 1d6 Cold damage on weapon attacks. Only one stance may be active at a time.
Arcane Stance
Imbue your blade with arcane force, dealing an additional 1d6 Force damage on weapon attacks. Only one stance may be active at a time.
Flying Sword
Hurl a telekinetic blade at a target, dealing 1d10 Force damage.
Dispel Misfortune
Trace a warding rune that ends one disease or condition afflicting a creature.
Mystic Ice
Conjure a shard of mystic ice that bursts on impact, dealing Cold damage and slowing nearby foes.
Soul Seal
Inscribe a soul-binding rune that paralyzes a humanoid target.
Talisman Ward
Project a talisman array that grants the target a bonus to Armor Class.
Thunder Summons
Call down a peal of thunder that strikes a target for Lightning damage.
Samadhi Fire
Emit rays of samadhi fire that scorch one or more targets for Fire damage.
Seven Star Array
Inscribe the Big Dipper array, radiating starlight that deals Radiant damage to enemies in the area.
Nine Heaven Thunder
Channel nine-fold celestial thunder that arcs between targets, dealing Lightning damage.
Heaven Earth Shift
Bend the axes of heaven and earth to teleport yourself and nearby allies to a chosen location.
Myriad Swords
Summon a storm of flying blades that strike repeatedly, dealing Force damage.
Taiyi Divine Thunder
Unleash a cone of Taiyi divine thunder that deals Lightning damage and may stun those caught within.
Primal Unity Qi
Circulate primal qi to heal nearby allies and grant them temporary vitality.
Immortal Slay Array
Deploy the ultimate slaying array, raining blades and divine force for massive Force damage across a wide area.
Heavenly Reincarnation
Bend the wheel of reincarnation to restore a fallen ally to full vitality.
All Dharmas Return
Compress all dharmas into a single annihilating beam that deals immense Force damage to one target.
Seal Rune
Crystallize a known spell into a scroll. Choose a spell from the Seal Rune submenu. Each use consumes one Seal Rune charge.
Seal Rune: Flying Sword
Crystallize Flying Sword into a scroll. Requires knowing Flying Sword.
Seal Rune: Dispel Misfortune
Crystallize Dispel Misfortune into a scroll. Requires knowing Dispel Misfortune.
Seal Rune: Mystic Ice
Crystallize Mystic Ice into a scroll. Requires knowing Mystic Ice.
Seal Rune: Soul Seal
Crystallize Soul Seal into a scroll. Requires knowing Soul Seal.
Seal Rune: Talisman Ward
Crystallize Talisman Ward into a scroll. Requires knowing Talisman Ward.
Seal Rune: Thunder Summons
Crystallize Thunder Summons into a scroll. Requires knowing Thunder Summons.
Seal Rune: Samadhi Fire
Crystallize Samadhi Fire into a scroll. Requires knowing Samadhi Fire.
Seal Rune: Seven Star Array
Crystallize Seven Star Array into a scroll. Requires knowing Seven Star Array.
Seal Rune: Nine Heaven Thunder
Crystallize Nine Heaven Thunder into a scroll. Requires knowing Nine Heaven Thunder.
Seal Rune: Heaven Earth Shift
Crystallize Heaven Earth Shift into a scroll. Requires knowing Heaven Earth Shift.
Seal Rune: Myriad Swords
Crystallize Myriad Swords into a scroll. Requires knowing Myriad Swords.
Seal Rune: Taiyi Divine Thunder
Crystallize Taiyi Divine Thunder into a scroll. Requires knowing Taiyi Divine Thunder.
Seal Rune: Primal Unity Qi
Crystallize Primal Unity Qi into a scroll. Requires knowing Primal Unity Qi.
Seal Rune: Immortal Slay Array
Crystallize Immortal Slay Array into a scroll. Requires knowing Immortal Slay Array.
Seal Rune: Heavenly Reincarnation
Crystallize Heavenly Reincarnation into a scroll. Requires knowing Heavenly Reincarnation.
Seal Rune: All Dharmas Return
Crystallize All Dharmas Return into a scroll. Requires knowing All Dharmas Return.
Sword Intent Guard I
While not wearing armor and not wielding a shield, your AC increases by 1.
Sword Intent Guard II
While not wearing armor and not wielding a shield, your AC increases by 2.
Sword Intent Guard III
While not wearing armor and not wielding a shield, your AC increases by 3.
Sword Intent Guard IV
While not wearing armor and not wielding a shield, your AC increases by 4.
Sword Intent Guard V
While not wearing armor and not wielding a shield, your AC increases by 5.
Sword Intent Guard VI
While not wearing armor and not wielding a shield, your AC increases by 6.
Extra Attack
You can attack twice per turn when taking the Attack action.
Extra Attack (II)
You can attack three times per turn when taking the Attack action.
Extra Attack (III)
You can attack four times per turn when taking the Attack action.
Sword God Descent
The sword god descends: your stance enchantment damage die escalates to 3d6, and you gain a fourth attack per turn.
Stance Damage I
While a Sword Path stance is active, your weapon attacks deal an additional 1d6 of the matching element.
Stance Damage II
While a Sword Path stance is active, your weapon attacks deal an additional 1d8 of the matching element.
Stance Damage III
While a Sword Path stance is active, your weapon attacks deal an additional 1d10 of the matching element.
Stance Damage IV
While a Sword Path stance is active, your weapon attacks deal an additional 2d6 of the matching element.
Stance Damage V
While a Sword Path stance is active, your weapon attacks deal an additional 3d6 of the matching element.
Seal Rune
You can crystallize a known spell into a scroll. Select a spell from the Seal Rune submenu.
Seal Rune Charges (1)
Grants 1 Seal Rune charge, regained after a Long Rest.
Seal Rune Charges (2)
Grants 2 Seal Rune charges, regained after a Long Rest.
Seal Rune Charges (4)
Grants 4 Seal Rune charges, regained after a Long Rest.
Dao Follows Nature
Once per Long Rest, you may cast a homebrew spell of 8th level or below without expending a spell slot.
Scroll of Flying Sword
A scroll inscribed with the Flying Sword rune. Reading it casts Flying Sword.
Scroll of Dispel Misfortune
A scroll inscribed with the Dispel Misfortune rune. Reading it casts Dispel Misfortune.
Scroll of Mystic Ice
A scroll inscribed with the Mystic Ice rune. Reading it casts Mystic Ice.
Scroll of Soul Seal
A scroll inscribed with the Soul Seal rune. Reading it casts Soul Seal.
Scroll of Talisman Ward
A scroll inscribed with the Talisman Ward rune. Reading it casts Talisman Ward.
Scroll of Thunder Summons
A scroll inscribed with the Thunder Summons rune. Reading it casts Thunder Summons.
Scroll of Samadhi Fire
A scroll inscribed with the Samadhi Fire rune. Reading it casts Samadhi Fire.
Scroll of Seven Star Array
A scroll inscribed with the Seven Star Array rune. Reading it casts Seven Star Array.
Scroll of Nine Heaven Thunder
A scroll inscribed with the Nine Heaven Thunder rune. Reading it casts Nine Heaven Thunder.
Scroll of Heaven Earth Shift
A scroll inscribed with the Heaven Earth Shift rune. Reading it casts Heaven Earth Shift.
Scroll of Myriad Swords
A scroll inscribed with the Myriad Swords rune. Reading it casts Myriad Swords.
Scroll of Taiyi Divine Thunder
A scroll inscribed with the Taiyi Divine Thunder rune. Reading it casts Taiyi Divine Thunder.
Scroll of Primal Unity Qi
A scroll inscribed with the Primal Unity Qi rune. Reading it casts Primal Unity Qi.
Scroll of Immortal Slay Array
A scroll inscribed with the Immortal Slay Array rune. Reading it casts Immortal Slay Array.
Scroll of Heavenly Reincarnation
A scroll inscribed with the Heavenly Reincarnation rune. Reading it casts Heavenly Reincarnation.
Scroll of All Dharmas Return
A scroll inscribed with the All Dharmas Return rune. Reading it casts All Dharmas Return.
Flame Stance
Imbued with flame. Weapon attacks deal an additional 1d6 Fire damage.
Thunder Stance
Imbued with thunder. Weapon attacks deal an additional 1d6 Thunder damage.
Frost Stance
Imbued with frost. Weapon attacks deal an additional 1d6 Cold damage.
Arcane Stance
Imbued with arcane force. Weapon attacks deal an additional 1d6 Force damage.
Sword Qi Sweep
Sweep a cone of sword qi, dealing 6d6 Force damage to foes within.
Vajra Guard
Forge a vajra-hardened body, granting damage resistance and temporary vitality to yourself or an ally.
Flame Lotus
Bloom a lotus of flame, dealing 7d6 Fire damage to enemies in the area.
Sword Flight
Ride your blade through the air to a point, dealing 5d8 Force damage to nearby foes on landing.
Heaven Fire
Rain heavenly fire down upon a wide area, dealing 8d6 Fire damage.
Frost Lock
Frost seals the land for three li, dealing 6d8 Cold damage and rooting enemies in the area.
Myriad Swords Launch
Launch myriad swords at once, a multi-strike force barrage dealing 10d6 Force damage.
Purple Thunder
Strike with violet celestial thunder, dealing 10d8 Lightning damage.
Endless Vitality
Circulate endless vitality, mass-healing for 8d8 and granting regeneration.
Scroll of Sword Qi Sweep
A scroll inscribed with the Sword Qi Sweep rune. Reading it casts Sword Qi Sweep.
Scroll of Vajra Guard
A scroll inscribed with the Vajra Guard rune. Reading it casts Vajra Guard.
Scroll of Flame Lotus
A scroll inscribed with the Flame Lotus rune. Reading it casts Flame Lotus.
Scroll of Sword Flight
A scroll inscribed with the Sword Flight rune. Reading it casts Sword Flight.
Scroll of Heaven Fire
A scroll inscribed with the Heaven Fire rune. Reading it casts Heaven Fire.
Scroll of Frost Lock
A scroll inscribed with the Frost Lock rune. Reading it casts Frost Lock.
Scroll of Myriad Swords Launch
A scroll inscribed with the Myriad Swords Launch rune. Reading it casts Myriad Swords Launch.
Scroll of Purple Thunder
A scroll inscribed with the Purple Thunder rune. Reading it casts Purple Thunder.
Scroll of Endless Vitality
A scroll inscribed with the Endless Vitality rune. Reading it casts Endless Vitality.
Seal Rune: Sword Qi Sweep
Crystallize Sword Qi Sweep into a scroll. Requires knowing Sword Qi Sweep.
Seal Rune: Vajra Guard
Crystallize Vajra Guard into a scroll. Requires knowing Vajra Guard.
Seal Rune: Flame Lotus
Crystallize Flame Lotus into a scroll. Requires knowing Flame Lotus.
Seal Rune: Sword Flight
Crystallize Sword Flight into a scroll. Requires knowing Sword Flight.
Seal Rune: Heaven Fire
Crystallize Heaven Fire into a scroll. Requires knowing Heaven Fire.
Seal Rune: Frost Lock
Crystallize Frost Lock into a scroll. Requires knowing Frost Lock.
Seal Rune: Myriad Swords Launch
Crystallize Myriad Swords Launch into a scroll. Requires knowing Myriad Swords Launch.
Seal Rune: Purple Thunder
Crystallize Purple Thunder into a scroll. Requires knowing Purple Thunder.
Seal Rune: Endless Vitality
Crystallize Endless Vitality into a scroll. Requires knowing Endless Vitality.
TianGang North Star Formation
Conjure a star formation, dealing 6d8 radiant damage to nearby enemies and slowing them.
Nine Heavens Thunder
Call thunder from nine heavens, dealing 12d8 lightning damage to target and nearby enemies.
Qian Kun Shift
Teleport to target location, dealing 8d8 force damage at destination.
Tai Yi Divine Thunder
Channel Tai Yi divine thunder on a single target for 12d6 lightning damage.
Ten Thousand Swords Return
Summon a storm of flying swords for 15d6 force damage.
Primordial One Qi
Release primordial qi, healing allies for 10d8 HP.
Immortal-Slaying Sword Formation
Unleash a devastating sword formation for 16d6 force damage in a large area.
Ten Thousand Laws Return to One
Ultimate annihilation, dealing 20d6 force damage to a single target.
Seal Rune: TianGang North Star Formation
Crystallize TianGang North Star Formation into a scroll. Requires knowing TianGang North Star Formation.
Seal Rune: Nine Heavens Thunder
Crystallize Nine Heavens Thunder into a scroll. Requires knowing Nine Heavens Thunder.
Seal Rune: Qian Kun Shift
Crystallize Qian Kun Shift into a scroll. Requires knowing Qian Kun Shift.
Seal Rune: Tai Yi Divine Thunder
Crystallize Tai Yi Divine Thunder into a scroll. Requires knowing Tai Yi Divine Thunder.
Seal Rune: Ten Thousand Swords Return
Crystallize Ten Thousand Swords Return into a scroll. Requires knowing Ten Thousand Swords Return.
Seal Rune: Primordial One Qi
Crystallize Primordial One Qi into a scroll. Requires knowing Primordial One Qi.
Seal Rune: Immortal-Slaying Sword Formation
Crystallize Immortal-Slaying Sword Formation into a scroll. Requires knowing Immortal-Slaying Sword Formation.
Seal Rune: Ten Thousand Laws Return to One
Crystallize Ten Thousand Laws Return to One into a scroll. Requires knowing Ten Thousand Laws Return to One.
Sword Intent Guard VI
While not wearing armor and not wielding a shield, your AC increases by 6.
Rune Sword Infusion III
While a Sword Path stance is active, your weapon attacks deal an additional 2d6 of the matching element.
Sword Heart Clarity
Critical hit range +1, weapon attacks deal an additional 1d6 force damage.
Sword God Descent
Peak of swordsmanship. +2 AC, +2d6 force damage on weapons, resistance to physical and force damage, increased movement speed.
Seal Rune (3/Long Rest)
Grants 3 Seal Rune charges, regained after a Long Rest.
Seal Rune (4/Long Rest)
Grants 4 Seal Rune charges, regained after a Long Rest.
Dao of Nature
Spellcasting mastery peak. Gain 2 additional 6th-level spell slots, +2 spellcasting ability.
Transcendent
Body and mind transcend mortality. +2 to all saving throws, resistance to non-magical bludgeoning/piercing/slashing damage.
Swift Step
Agile footwork increases movement speed by 3m.
Precognitive Reflex
Heightened awareness grants +2 initiative.
Scroll of TianGang North Star Formation
A scroll inscribed with the TianGang North Star Formation rune. Reading it casts TianGang North Star Formation.
Scroll of Nine Heavens Thunder
A scroll inscribed with the Nine Heavens Thunder rune. Reading it casts Nine Heavens Thunder.
Scroll of Qian Kun Shift
A scroll inscribed with the Qian Kun Shift rune. Reading it casts Qian Kun Shift.
Scroll of Tai Yi Divine Thunder
A scroll inscribed with the Tai Yi Divine Thunder rune. Reading it casts Tai Yi Divine Thunder.
Scroll of Ten Thousand Swords Return
A scroll inscribed with the Ten Thousand Swords Return rune. Reading it casts Ten Thousand Swords Return.
Scroll of Primordial One Qi
A scroll inscribed with the Primordial One Qi rune. Reading it casts Primordial One Qi.
Scroll of Immortal-Slaying Sword Formation
A scroll inscribed with the Immortal-Slaying Sword Formation rune. Reading it casts Immortal-Slaying Sword Formation.
Scroll of Ten Thousand Laws Return to One
A scroll inscribed with the Ten Thousand Laws Return to One rune. Reading it casts Ten Thousand Laws Return to One.
